briefdescription.para: Copy constructor is deleted to avoid copying instances.
Assignment operator is deleted to avoid copying instances.
Virtual destructor for proper cleanup of derived classes.
Check if the temperature sensor is initialized.

simplesect.para: true if initialized, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Ensures the sensor is initialized (lazy initialization).

simplesect.para: true if initialized successfully, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Ensures the sensor is deinitialized (lazy deinitialization).

simplesect.para: true if deinitialized successfully, false otherwise
Current sensor state
Error code (TEMP_SUCCESS on success)

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store complete reading information

simplesect.para: Error code (TEMP_SUCCESS on success)
Error code (TEMP_SUCCESS on success)
Error code (TEMP_SUCCESS on success)
Error code (TEMP_SUCCESS on success)
Error code (TEMP_SUCCESS on success)
Capabilities flags (hf_temp_capabilities_t)

briefdescription.para: Check if a specific capability is supported.

simplesect.para: true if supported, false otherwise
Error code (TEMP_SUCCESS on success, TEMP_ERR_UNSUPPORTED_OPERATION if not supported)
Error code (TEMP_SUCCESS on success, TEMP_ERR_UNSUPPORTED_OPERATION if not supported)

Error code (TEMP_SUCCESS on success, TEMP_ERR_UNSUPPORTED_OPERATION if not supported)

simplesect.para: true if monitoring is active, false otherwise
Error code (TEMP_SUCCESS on success, TEMP_ERR_UNSUPPORTED_OPERATION if not supported)
Error code (TEMP_SUCCESS on success, TEMP_ERR_UNSUPPORTED_OPERATION if not supported)

briefdescription.para: Check if sensor is in sleep mode (advanced feature)

simplesect.para: true if in sleep mode, false otherwise
Error code (TEMP_SUCCESS on success, TEMP_ERR_UNSUPPORTED_OPERATION if not supported)
Error code (TEMP_SUCCESS if healthy, TEMP_ERR_UNSUPPORTED_OPERATION if not supported)

simplesect.para: Error code (TEMP_SUCCESS on success, TEMP_ERR_UNSUPPORTED_OPERATION if not supported)

true if initialization successful, false otherwise
true if deinitialization successful, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Platform-specific implementation for reading temperature in Celsius.

simplesect.para: Error code (TEMP_SUCCESS on success)

briefdescription.para: Protected helper to validate basic operation preconditions.

simplesect.para: Error code (TEMP_SUCCESS if valid to proceed)

briefdescription.para: Abstract base class for all temperature sensor implementations.

detaileddescription.para: This class defines the common interface that all temperature sensor implementations must follow. It provides a consistent API for temperature measurement, configuration, and monitoring across different sensor types and platforms.

Key features:
Abstract interface for temperature reading
Standardized error handling
Support for various temperature units
Threshold monitoring capabilities (advanced feature)
Power management support (advanced feature)
Calibration interface (advanced feature)
Lazy initialization pattern

simplesect.para: This is a header-only abstract base class
All concrete implementations must inherit from this class
Thread safety is implementation-dependent
Advanced features return TEMP_ERR_UNSUPPORTED_OPERATION if not supported
